## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Translation update

## Security & Privacy Checklist
<!-- Please review this checklist before submitting. -->
- [ ] I have not logged any private keys, seed phrases, or sensitive vault data.
- [ ] I have not weakened any existing encryption or security measures.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce unnecessary network requests (xKey is an offline vault).
- [ ] I have tested this change locally.
